'''Prazhi''' was an [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Cyrillian Protectorate/Legends|Cyrillian Protectorate]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Zexx]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. A member of the [[galactic community]] since at least [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]], a [[4000 BBY/Legends|millennium]] later Prazhi was situated on an important [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade route]]. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]], Prazhi had become a [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] world the economy of which was revitalized by Imperial efforts to [[Colonist/Legends|resettle]] the Expansion Region.

==Description==
Prazhi was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TOTJC" /> located in the [[Prazhi system/Legends|Prazhi system]], a part of the [[Cyrillian Protectorate/Legends|Cyrillian Protectorate]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Between [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] and [[3996 BBY]], Prazhi was situated on a<ref name="TEA" /> commercially important<ref name="TOTJC" /> [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that connected it to the [[Circarpous system/Legends|Circarpous]] and [[Cyrillia system/Legends|Cyrillia systems]], but that [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route had ceased to exist by [[3976 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
By 5000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], Prazhi had become a part of the area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] widely [[Scout/Legends|explored]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and referred to as the "civilized [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]."<ref name="TEA" /> Prazhi eventually became a [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] world, and although it had suffered from an economic decline by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Imperial efforts to [[Colonist/Legends|resettle]] the Expansion Region resulted in a positive effect upon Prazhi's economy.<ref name="FDCR">[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]]</ref>

==Inhabitants==
Prazhi was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Zexx]] [[Species/Legends|species]], members of which organized themselves into tribes before the incorporation of the planet into the wider [[galactic community]]. Eventually, many Zexx worked at the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] docking areas established on the planet. while many others of the species became employed aboard off-world ships.<ref name="TOTJC" />

==Locations==
By [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]],<ref name="4000 BBY">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' is set 4,000 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which translates to [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> several docking areas with [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]], [[refueling station]]s, and repair shops were established on Prazhi.<ref name="TOTJC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Prazhi was first mentioned in the [[1996]] [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'', written by [[George R. Strayton]] and published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TOTJC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Prazhi [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Prazhi, in grid square O-12.<ref name="TEA" />
